mapper.select: SELECT a.*, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_announcement_read r WHERE r.announcement_id = a.id AND r.user_id = #{userId}) > 0 as is_read FROM edu_announcement a WHERE a.status = 1 AND (a.target_type = 'ALL' OR a.target_type = #{targetType}) ORDER BY a.priority DESC, a.publish_time DESC

SELECT id, title, priority, target_type as targetType, publisher_name as publisherName, publish_time as publishTime FROM edu_announcement WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY priority DESC, publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_announcement ( title, content, priority, target_type, publisher_id, publisher_name, publish_time, status ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{priority}, #{targetType}, #{publisherId}, #{publisherName}, #{publishTime}, #{status} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE edu_announcement
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
priority = #{priority},
target_type = #{targetType},
publish_time = #{publishTime},
status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_announcement a WHERE a.status = 1 AND (a.target_type = 'ALL' OR a.target_type = #{targetType}) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM edu_announcement_read r WHERE r.announcement_id = a.id AND r.user_id = #{userId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO edu_announcement_read (announcement_id, user_id) VALUES (#{announcementId}, #{userId})
